race.comment: GOLDEN MAGNATE (6) has been freshened up since finishing seventh over 1200m at Caulfield Heath having won well on debut in good time at Moe with a big gap to third. He can do much better here. Each-way. MISSAPPREHEND (12) looks to launch this prep the way she ended the last six months ago when she scored over 1400m at Sandown-Lakeside. Has always promised a bit and can pick up where she left off. JENNI MULTABELLA (14) resumes with a handy profile, she beat a handy one on debut here and should take holding out. HAPPY TIERS (8) returns from a spell. Coming along well including placing in the latest Traralgon jump-out. Opened last campaign with a fifth at Bendigo over 1100m. In the mix.
